problem.title: You're leaving money on the table if you haven't realized that…
problem.description: The business game is no longer just about management, goals, and hiring. The gap between those who use AI strategically and those who don't keeps growing. Ignoring this means missing the biggest opportunity of the century.

points.title: You implemented AI but saw no ROI
points.description: 80% of AI projects never leave the pilot phase. Not because the technology doesn't work — but because there's no architecture and strategy.

points.title: Your organic traffic is declining
points.description: Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search and Perplexity changed search. Your 2019 SEO no longer works.

points.title: You don't know where to start
points.description: A new model comes out every day. The noise is greater than the signal. Without guidance, you're stuck.

points.title: Your team has no AI direction
points.description: Without an AI Lead who understands business, technology, and execution, you'll fall behind the market.

problem.cta: I want to understand how to get out of this

bio.name: Marcos Luciano
bio.description: AI Lead and consultant specialized in artificial intelligence with a focus on practical business applications. I develop projects, architectures, and AI training for companies looking to adapt and lead in this new era. I create daily content about AI, intelligent systems architecture, and AI Search, with over 12 years of experience in technology and digital strategy.

ctaSection.title: Ready to build your AI architecture?
ctaSection.description: Request a personalized quote. Includes detailed briefing, feasibility analysis, and a proposal with investment, scope, and timeline.
ctaSection.guarantee: No-obligation proposal with a detailed analysis of your scenario.

items.a: A methodology that puts AI at the center of business strategy. Unlike traditional consulting, we treat AI as infrastructure — and design systems, processes, and teams around it.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: Measurable results between 30 and 90 days. Diagnosis in 1 week. Roadmap in 2 weeks. First experiments in 30 days. Scale results between 3 and 6 months.

items.q: Do I need a tech team?
items.a: No. We serve everyone from solo founders to established companies. For founders without a team, we deliver full execution via a specialized outsourced squad.

Each project is unique. Investment varies by scope, complexity, and timeline. Consulting projects start at $15K. Full AI architecture projects can reach $120K. Request a quote for a personalized assessment.

items.q: What's the difference from other consultancies?
items.a: We don't sell tools — we sell architecture. We don't do endless pilots — we deliver production. Our consultants are engineers who execute.

items.q: Do you serve clients outside Brazil?
items.a: Yes. We serve clients in Brazil, the US, and Latin America. Sessions in Portuguese, English, or Spanish. 100% remote.

whatsapp.title: Prefer a more direct contact?
whatsapp.description: Send a WhatsApp message with your name, company, and project brief. I'll respond with a preliminary quote within 24h.
whatsapp.message: Hi! I'd like to request a quote for AI First consulting. Here's my project brief:
